codeReview.summary: Implementation matches feature scope: persistence::v1 module added with version=2 snapshots, save/load routed through the v1 schema, explicit legacy-version rejection message implemented, and required round-trip + legacy-rejection tests are present.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The architecture library note still documents an outdated legacy-version error string for snapshot loading, which no longer matches the implemented user-facing contract.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:99 says rejection message is "Unsupported snapshot file version — produced by an older csv-align release. Re-run the comparison in v2.", while src/backend/comparison_snapshot.rs:26 now returns "Unsupported comparison snapshot version {n} — this file was produced by an older csv-align release. Re-run the comparison in v2."

summary: Pass. The feature requirements are implemented and covered by tests; no blocking or non-blocking code defects were found in this review.
